title: C001: Add Keystone container image and release config
summary: Post-external-review fix commit addressing three bugs found by greptile-apps[bot]: (1) apply-constraint-overrides.sh sed replacement silently corrupted packages with Python-version markers — fixed with delete-then-append, (2) verify_deviation_comments.sh was the only test script not sourcing shared assertions.sh — now refactored to use assert_file_contains, (3) verify_venv_builder.sh set -e aborted script before capturing docker exit code — fixed with || exit_code=$? pattern. All fixes are correct, tests pass (13/13 constraint override assertions, 4/4 deviation comment assertions).

tests_checklist.item: Tests are independent (no shared mutable state)

security_checklist.item: No command injection via sed or echo (inputs are from controlled repo files)

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible

defensive_checklist.item: Exit codes captured correctly under set -e
